channel.title: Tsc on Open Component Model
channel.description: Recent content in Tsc on Open Component Model

item.title: Welcome Ilja Weis to the OCM Technical Steering Committee
item.description:
We are glad to announce that Ilja Weis from BWI GmbH has been voted into the OCM Technical Steering Committee.

BWI, the IT service provider for the German Armed Forces, joined the NeoNephos Foundation as a Premium Member earlier this year. Since then, the collaboration has been active: BWI contributed ocm-kit to the OCM community repository, a Go library and CLI tool for working with OCM-based Helm values templates. The TSC accepted the contribution unanimously in April 2026.
